testing_centers.notes: Computer-based testing at PSI or Pearson VUE test centers. Online proctoring available.

id_requirements: One valid, unexpired government-issued photo ID with full name and signature. Name must match ISACA registration exactly.
exam_rules: Closed-book. On-screen calculator provided. No notes or reference materials. Proctor monitors throughout.
renewal_options: Complete 120 CPE hours over 3 years (minimum 20 hours annually). Pay annual maintenance fee. Adhere to ISACA Code of Professional Ethics. CPE hours earned through education, conferences, professional activities.

prerequisites.description: 5 years of work experience in information systems auditing, control, or security

retake_policy.notes: Must wait 30 days before retaking. Maximum 3 exam attempts per 12-month period. Full exam fee required for each retake.

domains.name: Information Systems Acquisition, Development, and Implementation
Information Systems Operations and Business Resilience

official_study_resources.notes: Official review manuals, question databases, and virtual labs
